description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, glossy finish and a uniform, muted taupe color. The sofa features three main seat cushions and three backrest cushions, all of which are attached and have a smooth, slightly rounded appearance. Both ends of the sofa have low, cylindrical armrests that are padded and integrated into the overall form. The legs are short, dark, and slightly tapered, positioned at the corners for stability and minimal visual intrusion. The upholstery is smooth and untextured, giving the sofa a contemporary, polished look. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on comfort and style.
description: A modern, glossy taupe L-shaped sectional sofa with smooth, attached cushions and low, rounded armrests. The design is sleek and minimalist, featuring short, dark legs and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and both low, rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise extension and the profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the main seating section and the armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three attached back cushions, all uniform in size and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, cylindrical, padded armrests present on both ends, integrated into the sofa's form with a smooth, rounded profile.
attribute_leg_design: Short, dark, slightly tapered legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, with a minimal and unobtrusive appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a straight, smooth profile and attached cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, and glossy upholstery with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
